message:
feat(tools): add BVAdapter for structured bv command execution

Introduce BVAdapter as a type-safe wrapper around bv CLI commands,
replacing direct bv.RunRaw calls with structured method calls that
return []byte for consistent JSON handling.

BVAdapter methods:
- GetGroupedTriage: Execute -robot-triage-by-label or -robot-triage-by-track
- GetHistory: Execute -robot-history command
- GetBurndown: Execute -robot-burndown <sprint> command

Design rationale:
- Methods return []byte to preserve raw JSON for caller parsing
- Options structs provide type-safe configuration
- Context parameter enables cancellation/timeout
- Consistent error handling across all bv operations

Contract test updates:
- Update existing tests to work with new adapter interface
- Ensure fake bv tool coverage extends to new command patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
